title: Registered Offering Reform
raw_text:
Registered Offering Reform

The Securities and Exchange Commission ("Commission") is proposing amendments that are intended to facilitate capital formation in the public securities markets. Specifically, the proposed amendments would make Form S-3 and the ability to conduct shelf offerings available to significantly more issuers, extend certain benefits currently reserved for "well-known seasoned issuers" to a broader set of issuers, and modernize Form S-1 by expanding the ability to incorporate information by reference into that form. The proposed amendments also would make conforming changes to the registration, communication, and offering process for certain business development companies and registered closed-end investment companies that register securities on Form N-2. We also are proposing to amend the communication rules to permit broad-based advertising for certain insurance products. In addition, we are proposing certain other amendments that are intended to modernize certain rules. Finally, to mitigate the costs and complexity of conducting a registered offering, the proposed amendments would preempt State securities law registration and qualification requirements for all registered offerings.

title: Semiannual Reporting
raw_text:
Semiannual Reporting

The Securities and Exchange Commission ("Commission") is proposing amendments to allow companies to file semiannual reports on new Form 10-S in lieu of quarterly reports on Form 10-Q to meet their interim reporting obligations under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 ("Exchange Act"). The Commission is also proposing changes to the financial statement requirements of Regulation S-X to facilitate semiannual reporting and to simplify rules regarding the age of financial statements.

title: MIAX Pearl Options Exchange - June 1, 2026 Fee Changes
raw_text:
MIAX Pearl — Fee Change Alert — MIAX Pearl Options Exchange - June 1, 2026 Fee Changes
Fee Change Alert MIAX Pearl May 29, 2026 | 03:34 PM MIAX Pearl Options Exchange - June 1, 2026 Fee Changes Effective June 1, 2026, the MIAX Pearl Options Exchange will amend the following fees pending filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission: MIAX Pearl Options – Per Contract Rebates/Fees for Non-Penny Classes New Maker Rebates Priority Customer: ($1.06) for Tiers 1-6 Pearl Market Maker: ($0.55) for Tiers 1-2 Non-Priority Customer, Firm, BD, and Non-MIAX Pearl Market Maker: ($0.55) for Tiers 1-2 New Taker Fees Pearl Market Maker $1.20 for Tiers 1-6 Non-Priority Customer, Firm, BD, and Non-MIAX Pearl Market Maker: $1.20 for Tiers 1-6 Attached is a highlighted summary of the fee changes. Complete details will be contained in the June 2026 MIAX Pearl Options fee schedule, when posted on the MIAX website at MIAX Pearl Options Fee Schedule . For additional information, please contact MIAX Sales at Sales@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-8177. title: MIAX Exchange Group - Options Markets - Trade-by-Trade Report Launching June 1, 2026
raw_text:
MIAX Pearl — Trading Alert, Technical Alert — MIAX Exchange Group - Options Markets - Trade-by-Trade Report Launching June 1, 2026
Trading Alert, Technical Alert MIAX Pearl May 27, 2026 | 11:07 AM MIAX Exchange Group - Options Markets - Trade-by-Trade Report Launching June 1, 2026 Beginning June 1, 2026, a new Trade-by-Trade Report will be available for monthly subscription and historical data purchase for the MIAX Options, MIAX Pearl Options, and MIAX Emerald Options exchanges. Trade-by-Trade Report Details : The Trade-by-Trade Report will provide recipients with comprehensive trade level detail for each trade executed on the MIAX Options, MIAX Pearl Options, and MIAX Emerald Options exchanges, with each row in the report representing one side of a single trade event. The report includes trade date, session, trade time, trade ID, complex trade ID, transaction ID, underlying symbol, expiration, strike, type (i.e., put or call), penny or non-penny class, trade quantity, trade price, side (buy or sell), open/close indicator, origin, market context indicators, and a trade segment code for each trade side record. The Trade-by-Trade Report for MIAX Pearl Options Exchange subscribers will not contain complex trade ID details. Trade-by-Trade history is available for each exchange dating back to the following years and months. MIAX Options: January 2013; MIAX Pearl Options: March 2017; and MIAX Emerald Options: March 2019. The reports will be available via the MIAX SFTP site. The Trade-by-Trade Report will be subject to fees announced in a future alert and pending filings with the Securities and Exchange Commission. The full content, timeframes and data scope of the Trade-by-Trade Report can be found in Rule 531 for each exchange. Further details regarding reports can be found at: MIAX Options Reports MIAX Pearl Options Reports MIAX Emerald Options Reports To establish or update market data agreements, please contact MIAX Market Data at MarketDataSupport@miaxglobal.com . Participants can request reports and specifications by contacting Trading Operations at TradingOperations@MIAXOptions.com or (609) 897-7302. For additional information, please contact MIAX Sales at Sales@MIAXOptions.com or (609) 897-8177.

The report includes trade date, session, trade time, trade ID, complex trade ID, transaction ID, underlying symbol, expiration, strike, type (i.e., put or call), penny or non-penny class, trade quantity, trade price, side (buy or sell), open/close indicator, origin, market context indicators, and a trade segment code for each trade side record. The Trade-by-Trade Report for MIAX Pearl Options Exchange subscribers will not contain complex trade ID details. Trade-by-Trade history is available for each exchange dating back to the following years and months. MIAX Options: January 2013; MIAX Pearl Options: March 2017; and MIAX Emerald Options: March 2019. The reports will be available via the MIAX SFTP site. The Trade-by-Trade Report will be subject to fees announced in a future alert and pending filings with the Securities and Exchange Commission. The full content, timeframes and data scope of the Trade-by-Trade Report can be found in Rule 531 for each exchange. Further details regarding reports can be found at: MIAX Options Reports MIAX Pearl Options Reports MIAX Emerald Options Reports To establish or update market data agreements, please contact MIAX Market Data at MarketDataSupport@miaxglobal.com . Participants can request reports and specifications by contacting Trading Operations at TradingOperations@MIAXOptions.com or (609) 897-7302. For additional information, please contact MIAX Sales at Sales@MIAXOptions.com or (609) 897-8177.

title: MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange - Upcoming Enhancements - Live on June 11, 2026
raw_text:
MIAX Sapphire — Trading Alert, Technical Alert, Regulatory Alert — MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange - Upcoming Enhancements - Live on June 11, 2026
Trading Alert, Technical Alert, Regulatory Alert MIAX Sapphire May 21, 2026 | 11:27 AM MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange - Upcoming Enhancements - Live on June 11, 2026 As previously announced in the Jan 28, 2026 Alert and Apr 15, 2026 Alert , the following functionality for the MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange will be available in production on June 11, 2026. Selective Liquidity Auto Purge (SLAP) Functionality This optional feature enhances the Mass Cancellation functionality by providing Members with the ability to remove a subset of its orders in the System With the introduction of a new “SLAP Codes” field in the Standard Binary Order – New Message, Members can specify custom SLAP codes, numbered 1 through 8, on some or all of its liquidity, providing more granular control of the Liquidity Mass Cancel Request when attempting to “Selectively Purge” specific liquidity The SLAP enhancement is contained within the MEO Interface (v1.2) release This feature requires certification prior to being used in production Increased Options Leg Ratio This feature supports the increase of the Options leg ratio for Complex orders up to 999,999 Consistent with current handling, The Order Quantity multiplied by the highest Option Leg Ratio of the strategy must be less than or equal to 999,999 The Order Quantity multiplied by the Stock Leg Ratio of the strategy, if present, must be less than or equal to 99,999,999 This enhancement is contained within the FOI Interface (2.3a) release Certification is not required to use this feature in production Additional Details These enhancements are currently available in the MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange's Firm Test Bed (FTB2) environment Updated specifications can be found at MIAX Sapphire Options Interface Specifications Please contact MIAX Trading Operations at TradingOperations@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-7302 to update configurations, arrange interface testing and schedule certification.

title: MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange - Planned network switch expansion for the 10G ULL extranet and mandatory testing
raw_text:
MIAX Sapphire — Technical Alert, Trading Alert — MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange - Planned network switch expansion for the 10G ULL extranet and mandatory testing
Technical Alert, Trading Alert MIAX Sapphire May 14, 2026 | 01:46 PM MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange - Planned network switch expansion for the 10G ULL extranet and mandatory testing MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange will expand the number of customer facing 10G ULL extranet edge switches from six to ten switches on Friday, July 17, 2026 post close of trading. For the four additional extranet edge switches, if firms want Cross Connect (CC) activation to coincide with the activation of the additional switches, LOAs are required to be requested at least four weeks prior to the planned cutover date of Friday, July 17, 2026. Following the upgrade, firms must conduct mandatory testing for all new CCs . Also, testing is recommended for existing CC customers. Details on testing: Testing will be held on Saturday, July 18, 2026 from 9:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m. EDT. Firms are required to perform the following verifications: Verify all 10G ULL CCs by logging into each subscribed application for each CC (i.e. establish application-level socket connections to MEO, MEI, FOI, CTD, etc., for all ports, across all CCs) and verify the login. Confirm heartbeat receipt for both the A & B market data feeds for all subscribed multicast feeds across each CC. After verifying connectivity, firms must inform MIAX Trading Operations at TradingOperations@miaxglobal.com . Please contact MIAX Trading Operations at TradingOperations@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-7302 to arrange testing or to receive additional information on the planned network refresh.

title: MIAX Pearl Options Exchange - Planned Network Switch Hardware Refresh for the 10G ULL Extranet and Mandatory Testing
raw_text:
MIAX Pearl — Technical Alert, Trading Alert — MIAX Pearl Options Exchange - Planned Network Switch Hardware Refresh for the 10G ULL Extranet and Mandatory Testing
Technical Alert, Trading Alert MIAX Pearl May 07, 2026 | 03:26 PM MIAX Pearl Options Exchange - Planned Network Switch Hardware Refresh for the 10G ULL Extranet and Mandatory Testing MIAX Pearl Options Exchange will refresh customer facing 10G ULL extranet edge switches on Friday, June 5, 2026, after the close of trading. All MIAX Pearl Options Exchange Extranet edge switches will be replaced one to one with the new model, and all firm Cross Connects (CCs) will be moved to the same ports on the new switches. There are no changes required by firms for this hardware upgrade. There are no changes on the 1G LL shared Extranet. Following the upgrade, firms must conduct mandatory testing for all Pearl Options 10G ULL CCs. Details on testing and verifications: Testing will be held on Saturday, June 6, 2026, from 9:00 a.m. to 1:00 p.m. EDT. Firms are required to perform the following verifications: Verify light levels and IP routing. Verify all 10G ULL CCs by logging into each subscribed application for each CC (i.e. establish application-level socket connections to MEO, MEI, FOI, CTD, etc., for all ports, across all CCs) and verify the login. Confirm heartbeat receipt for both the A & B market data feeds for all subscribed multicast feeds across each CC. After verifying connectivity, firms must inform MIAX Trading Operations at TradingOperations@miaxglobal.com . Please contact MIAX Trading Operations at TradingOperations@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-7302 to arrange testing or to receive additional information on the planned network refresh.

title: MIAX Sapphire Options - New Selective Liquidity Auto Purge (SLAP) Functionality Implementation Date
raw_text:
MIAX Sapphire — Trading Alert, Regulatory Alert — MIAX Sapphire Options - New Selective Liquidity Auto Purge (SLAP) Functionality Implementation Date
Trading Alert, Regulatory Alert MIAX Sapphire May 07, 2026 | 12:59 PM MIAX Sapphire Options - New Selective Liquidity Auto Purge (SLAP) Functionality Implementation Date A proposed rule change to MIAX Sapphire Exchange Rule 519C, Mass Cancellation of Trading Interest, to adopt Selective Liquidity Auto Purge (SLAP) functionality, will be implemented on June 13, 2026. The SLAP feature, the use of which is optional, will provide more granular mass cancellation functionality by allowing users to mass cancel specific groups of orders as determined by the Member on an order-by-order basis. For more information, please refer to the following Regulatory Circular: MIAX Sapphire Options RC 2026-64 Direct Regulatory questions to the Regulatory Department at Regulatory@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-7309.

title: MIAX Sapphire Options - Amendment to Exchange Rule 2040 Regarding Executing Certain Crossing Orders on the Trading Floor Immediately Without Announcement to the Trading Crowd
raw_text:
MIAX Sapphire — Regulatory Alert, Trading Alert — MIAX Sapphire Options - Amendment to Exchange Rule 2040 Regarding Executing Certain Crossing Orders on the Trading Floor Immediately Without Announcement to the Trading Crowd
Regulatory Alert, Trading Alert MIAX Sapphire May 06, 2026 | 10:51 AM MIAX Sapphire Options - Amendment to Exchange Rule 2040 Regarding Executing Certain Crossing Orders on the Trading Floor Immediately Without Announcement to the Trading Crowd Effective April 29, 2026, MIAX Sapphire Options Exchange Rule 2040, Qualified Floor Orders, was amended to permit Floor Brokers to immediately execute certain crossing orders on the Trading Floor without announcement to the trading crowd as required by Rule 2040(b), provided that certain requirements that allow each type of crossing order to be executed immediately on the electronic market are similarly satisfied on the Trading Floor. For more information on the rule amendment, please refer to the following Regulatory Circular: MIAX Sapphire Options RC 2026-63 Direct Regulatory questions to the Regulatory Department at Regulatory@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-7309.

raw_text:
MIAX Pearl Equities — Fee Change Alert — MIAX Pearl Equities Exchange - June 1, 2026 Updated List of Market Quality Securities for the NBBO Setter Plus Program
Fee Change Alert MIAX Pearl Equities May 29, 2026 | 10:08 AM MIAX Pearl Equities Exchange - June 1, 2026 Updated List of Market Quality Securities for the NBBO Setter Plus Program Effective June 1, 2026, MIAX Pearl Equities will update the List of Market Quality Securities for the NBBO Setter Plus Program. Updated list of Market Quality Securities qualifying for the "NBBO Setter Plus Program." The updated Market Quality Securities list, effective June 1, 2026, is posted on the MIAX website All other criteria for the NBBO Setter Plus Program remain the same All rebates associated with the NBBO Setter Plus Program remain the same Rebates for this program are applicable to the following Fee Codes: Liquidity Code AA, “Adds Liquidity, Displayed Order (Tape A)” Liquidity Code AB, “Adds Liquidity, Displayed Order (Tape B)” Liquidity Code AC, “Adds Liquidity, Displayed Order (Tape C)” Liquidity Code EA, “Early Trading Session, Adds Liquidity, Displayed Order (Tape A)” Liquidity Code EB, “Early Trading Session, Adds Liquidity, Displayed Order (Tape B)” Liquidity Code EC, “Early Trading Session, Adds Liquidity, Displayed Order (Tape C)” Liquidity Code FA, “Late Trading Session, Adds Liquidity, Displayed Order (Tape A)” Liquidity Code FB, “Late Trading Session, Adds Liquidity, Displayed Order (Tape B)” Liquidity Code FC, “Late Trading Session, Adds Liquidity, Displayed Order (Tape C)” For full details, please review the MIAX Pearl Equities Fee Schedule posted on the MIAX website at MIAX Pearl Equities Exchange Fees . To learn more about MIAX Pearl Equities please contact Sales@miaxglobal.com , (609) 897-8177 or visit miaxglobal.com. For further information, please contact MIAX Trading Operations at TradingOperations@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-7302.

raw_text:
MIAX Futures — Technical Alert, Regulatory Alert, Trading Alert — MIAX Futures Exchange - Onyx Trading Platform - Financial Futures - Reminder: Tini Bloomberg 500 Index Futures (TBX) Product Launch on May 31, 2026
Technical Alert, Regulatory Alert, Trading Alert MIAX Futures May 26, 2026 | 11:00 AM MIAX Futures Exchange - Onyx Trading Platform - Financial Futures - Reminder: Tini Bloomberg 500 Index Futures (TBX) Product Launch on May 31, 2026 As previously announced in the May 19, 2026 Alert, MIAX Futures introduced functionality to support trading of financial futures products on the MIAX Futures Onyx trading platform on Sunday, May 17, 2026. The MIAX Futures Financials Market Identifier Code (MIC) is XMFE. Financial futures products will trade in the NY5 data center. The Tini Bloomberg 500 Index Futures (TBX) Product will launch on Sunday, May 31, 2026 for the Monday, June 1, 2026 trade date. Financial Products Launch Schedule: Tini Bloomberg 100 Index Futures: TBQ - launched on Sunday, May 17, 2026 Tini Bloomberg 500 Index Futures: TBX - Sunday, May 31, 2026 for the Monday, June 1, 2026 trade date Bloomberg 500 Index Futures: BX - Sunday, June 7, 2026 for the Monday, June 8, 2026 trade date MIAX Futures Onyx Financial Futures Resources : The MIAX Futures Exchange Market Identifier Code (MIC) is XMFE Connectivity to the Firm Test Bed is currently available Firms can request Production and DR Cross Connects by contacting MIAXFuturesTradingOperations@miaxglobal.com Firm Certifications are currently available by contacting MIAXFuturesTradingOperations@miaxglobal.com Onyx Interface Specifications Onyx Functionality Onyx Trading Connectivity Onyx Market Data & Vendor Agreements Onyx Approved Vendors Onyx Audit Trail Requirements MIAX Futures Fees Onyx Trading Platform Access & Preferred Rate Program Onyx Listings Onyx Product Settings Trade Hours & Calendar Additional information on support for financial futures on MIAX Futures Onyx will be provided in future alerts. Product Alert, Regulatory Alert, Trading Alert, Clearing Alert MIAX Futures May 18, 2026 | 04:44 PM MIAX Futures Exchange - Minneapolis Hard Red Spring Wheat - Discontinuance of Warehouse Receipts for Delivery Against Futures As previously announced and approved by the CFTC, physical delivery in satisfaction of Minneapolis Hard Red Spring Wheat (HRSW) Futures will change from warehouse receipts to shipping certificates beginning with the September 2026 delivery period. Effective July 24, 2026, for the September 2026 and subsequent contracts, warehouse receipts will not be deliverable against Minneapolis HRSW Futures. Physical delivery in satisfaction of Minneapolis HRSW Futures for September 2026 and subsequent contracts will be by shipping certificate only. After the conclusion of the July 2026 delivery period on July 23, 2026, holders of outstanding warehouse receipts issued prior to the September 2026 contract may: Sell the warehouse receipt back to the issuing warehouse at a mutually agreeable price; Cancel the warehouse receipt for load-out; Continue holding the warehouse receipt and accrue storage obligations to the issuing warehouse; Sell, transfer, or otherwise dispose of such receipts as permitted by the United States Warehouse Act and applicable law. For all contract months up to and through the conclusion of the July 2026 delivery period (July 23, 2026): The maximum load-out charges on delivery grain tendered in satisfaction of a Minneapolis HRSW Futures Contract shall be eight cents (8¢) per bushel for wheat regardless of the date of the warehouse receipt. The maximum storage charges on delivery grain tendered in satisfaction of a Minneapolis HRSW Futures Contract shall be seven cents (7¢) per bushel per month or two thousand three hundred thirty three thousandths of a cent ($.002333) per bushel per day for wheat regardless of the date of the warehouse receipt. Insurance charges shall be included within the maximum storage charges. See Rule 50.3.3 for more information on load-out, storage, and insurance charges. Effective with the September 2026 contract, clearing members will be able to register shipping certificates on behalf of regular elevators for delivery against Minneapolis HRSW Futures. Additional information on shipping certificates can be found in the FAQ here . If you have any questions, please contact MIAX Futures Market Regulation at MIAXFuturesMarketReg@miaxglobal.com . Additional updates will be provided through future Alerts.

title: MIAX Futures Exchange - Onyx Trading Platform - Financial Futures - Reminder: Final Confidence Test and Launch on May 17, 2026
raw_text:
MIAX Futures — Trading Alert, Regulatory Alert, Technical Alert — MIAX Futures Exchange - Onyx Trading Platform - Financial Futures - Reminder: Final Confidence Test and Launch on May 17, 2026
Trading Alert, Regulatory Alert, Technical Alert MIAX Futures May 12, 2026 | 01:02 PM MIAX Futures Exchange - Onyx Trading Platform - Financial Futures - Reminder: Final Confidence Test and Launch on May 17, 2026 As previously announced in the April 29, 2026 and May 11, 2026 Alerts, MIAX Futures will introduce functionality to support trading of financial futures products on the MIAX Futures Onyx trading platform on Sunday, May 17, 2026 for the Monday, May 18, 2026 trade date. The MIAX Futures Financials Market Identifier Code (MIC) is XMFE. Financial futures products will trade in the NY5 data center. The Final Confidence Test will take place this Saturday, May 16, 2026 from 8:00 a.m. to 1:00 p.m. ET. Pre-Production Readiness Verification: For pre-production readiness verification, network and application layer connectivity testing to the MIAX Futures production environment is available during trading hours by request between now and Friday, May 15, 2026. Please contact MIAXfuturestradingoperations@MIAXGlobal.com to arrange for testing. Connectivity to the FOI, FEI and the FIX Drop interfaces will be provided via production credentials. The entering of test orders, among other supported message types, will be supported. The dissemination of data across production ToM and DoM multicast feeds will be supported during the testing period. Firms enabled to read the market data feeds may receive test data during the testing period. Firms intending to utilize the pre-production readiness period for production connectivity testing MUST take necessary steps to avoid unintended data leakage into their production systems. Firms MUST insulate their own production systems from this test data activity as needed. If this is not possible, firms MUST avoid establishing production connectivity during this time. Firms using an extranet provider may need to work with them directly to avoid receipt of the multicast data feeds during this period if that is the intent. Financial Products Launch Schedule: Tini Bloomberg 100 Index Futures: TBQ - Sunday, May 17, 2026 for the Monday, May 18, 2026 trade date Tini Bloomberg 500 Index Futures: TBX - Sunday, May 31, 2026 for the Monday, June 1, 2026 trade date Bloomberg 500 Index Futures: BX - Sunday, June 7, 2026 for the Monday, June 8, 2026 trade date MIAX Futures Onyx Financial Futures Resources : The MIAX Futures Exchange Market Identifier Code (MIC) is XMFE Connectivity to the Firm Test Bed is currently available Firms can request Production and DR Cross Connects by contacting MIAXFuturesTradingOperations@miaxglobal.com Firm Certifications are currently available by contacting MIAXFuturesTradingOperations@miaxglobal.com Onyx Interface Specifications Onyx Functionality Onyx Trading Connectivity Onyx Market Data & Vendor Agreements Onyx Approved Vendors Onyx Audit Trail Requirements MIAX Futures Fees Onyx Trading Platform Access & Preferred Rate Program Onyx Listings Onyx Product Settings Trade Hours & Calendar Additional information on support for financial futures on MIAX Futures Onyx will be provided in future alerts. Final product specifications remain subject to the submission of certain rule filings to the Commodity Futures Trading Commission. To learn more about MIAX Futures Onyx or new financial futures products please contact SalesFutures@miaxglobal.com . For further information, please contact MIAX Futures Trading Operations at MIAXFuturesTradingOperations@miaxglobal.com . To revise a current MIAX Alert subscription or to register to receive alerts for MIAX Futures, please visit MIAX Email Subscriptions .

title: MIAX Futures Exchange - Onyx Trading Platform - Financial Futures - Final Confidence Test Date - May 16, 2026
raw_text:
MIAX Futures — Technical Alert, Trading Alert, Regulatory Alert — MIAX Futures Exchange - Onyx Trading Platform - Financial Futures - Final Confidence Test Date - May 16, 2026
Technical Alert, Trading Alert, Regulatory Alert MIAX Futures May 11, 2026 | 11:03 AM MIAX Futures Exchange - Onyx Trading Platform - Financial Futures - Final Confidence Test Date - May 16, 2026 As previously announced in the February 3, 2026 and April 29, 2026 Alerts, MIAX Futures will conduct a final mock trading session on Saturday, May 16, 2026 in preparation for the upcoming launch of Financial Futures on Sunday, May 17, 2026 (Trade Date: May 18, 2026). Once production sessions have been requested and completed, firms may also request to conduct application layer connectivity testing or telnet connectivity testing prior to May 16, 2026 by contacting MIAXfuturestradingoperations@MIAXGlobal.com . This is the Final Confidence Test before launch so ALL FIRMS are strongly encouraged to participate. Please note, any firms testing through an ISV should confirm proper symbology with their respective ISV prior to testing. Test Day Timeline (ET) : 08:30 a.m. – Pre-opening connectivity windows open 08:45 a.m. – Live Order Window (LOW) First Pre-opening 09:30 a.m. – Extended 1 Trading Session 10:30 a.m. – Regular Trading Session 12:00 p.m. – Extended 2 Trading Session Disseminate Settlement Prices prior to end of Extended 2 Trading Session 1:00 p.m. – Closing and Live Order Window (LOW) Closes 1:05 p.m. – System Shutdown (Start of Recycle Window) Test Day Details : Trade Date will be Saturday, May 16, 2026 TBQ (Tini B100 Index Futures) will be available for testing from Cloud 1 MIAX Futures industry mock trading testing instruments available upon request MIAX Futures industry mock trading sessions will support the following activity utilizing assigned production network connections: Open firm participation via each of MIAX Futures technical interfaces: Futures Express Interface (FEI) FIX Order Interface (FOI) for FIX orders FIX Drop Copy (FXD) MIAX Futures Market Data Dissemination via each of the MIAX proprietary data feeds: Top of Market Data (ToM) Feed Depth of Market Data (DoM) Feed Firms interested in receiving test data from OCC generated from the Industry Test windows will need to register with OCC one week prior to participation to ensure connectivity and data service setup. OCC will be supporting testing in OCC’s External Test 3 environment for each Industry window. Trades input to MIAX Futures Onyx during the weekend test windows will be played into OCC's External Test 3 environment on each following Monday and will be available for registered entities. To register with OCC for participation, please complete the test request form at www.theocc.com/webapps/cert-test-services and indicate your request relates to MIAX Futures Onyx Industry Testing dates. Testing Suggestions : Send FIX and/or FEI Order Simple and/or Complex STOP Market, STOP Limit, Market, GTD, Market with Protection, STOP Market with Protection Cancel FIX and/or FEI Order Simple and/or Complex Cancel Replace FIX and/or FEI Order Simple and/or Complex Send Mass Cancel Request – this requires Firms to have MFP Access Send Complex Strategy Creation Request Receive Execution Simple and/or Complex Participants who plan to Validate Bust and Correction of a Trade via the FIX Drop Copy (FXD) must Coordinate with Trading Operations Market Data Subscribers Validate Instrument Definition Validate Market Data is being received Validate Retransmission Services If you have any questions or need to coordinate testing and connectivity, please contact MIAX Futures Trading Operations at MIAXfuturestradingoperations@miaxglobal.com or (609) 897-7303. To revise a current MIAX Alert subscription or to register a new subscription, please visit MIAX Email Subscriptions .

title: NYSE Arca - Extended Hours Trading Effective December 6, 2026
raw_text:
NYSE Arca - Extended Hours Trading Effective December 6, 2026
Markets: NYSE ARCA EQUITIES; Services: Trading, Post Trade, Market Data
Beginning December 6, 2026, subject to SEC approvals, NYSE Arca will extend its trading hours to operate from 9:00 PM ET Sunday through 8:00 PM ET Friday, with a one-hour pause between 8:00 PM and 9:00 PM ET Monday through Thursday, excluding holidays. Highlights New Trading Session - NYSE Arca will introduce the Overnight Trading Session as a fourth distinct session, running from 9:00 PM to 4:00 AM and trading all NMS securities. Trading begins continuously at 9:00 PM with no opening auction. Order entry will begin one minute earlier, at 8:59 PM. Existing Connectivity - Firms will use their existing NYSE Pillar Gateway ports and send a new TradingSessionID value to participate in the Overnight Session. Clearing firms can opt clients in or out of the new Overnight Session at the MPID level. Order Protection - NYSE Arca will extend Clearly Erroneous Execution (CEE) protections to the Overnight Session, with doubled numerical guidelines. Limit Order Price Protection will apply in the Overnight Session as in all other sessions. Additionally, the LULD committee has filed a proposed amendment to extend market-wide volatility controls to the Overnight Session. Corporate Action Processing - NYSE Arca and other listing exchanges will file rules to standardize how certain corporate actions are handled overnight, including the ability to declare regulatory halts uniformly across all NMS securities Market Data - Consolidated and NYSE Arca Proprietary Data Feeds will be available 23 hours a day. Updated system specifications will be distributed via Trader Update. For additional information, please visit NYSE Extended Hours Webpage or review the Extended Hours Trading Frequently Asked Questions.

title: NYSE Arca Options - NYSE Pillar Hardware Upgrade – Final Reminder
raw_text:
NYSE Arca Options - NYSE Pillar Hardware Upgrade – Final Reminder
Markets: NYSE ARCA OPTIONS; Services: Trading, Post Trade, Market Data
On Monday, June 1, 2026, NYSE Arca Options will upgrade hardware for its NYSE Pillar technology platform. There are no changes to specifications or sessions, and the migration will be an immediate cutover with no parallel production period, as previously announced . The Certification environment is currently available on the new hardware, and the final industry test is scheduled for Saturday, May 30, 2026. Proprietary Market Data Feeds Concurrently with the hardware upgrade, NYSE Arca Options Top (BBO and Trades), Deep and Complex (excluding Imbalance and Summary) feeds will expand from 17 to 24 Publisher, Refresh and Retransmission channels. Please note that Certification Source IPs will change and the NYSE Proprietary Data IP Addresses file has been updated to reflect new Production channels and Certification source IPs. Customers should use the start of day symbol reference data for symbol mapping information. There will be no XDP format changes. Key Dates Industry Test Saturday, May 30, 2026 New hardware in Production Monday, June 1, 2026 Heartbeats on new market data channels Monday, June 1, 2026 Test symbols on new market data channels Tuesday, June 9, 2026 DR Industry Test Saturday, June 27, 2026 New hardware in DR Monday, June 29, 2026 Production symbols on new market data channels Tuesday, June 30, 2026

title: NYSE Arca Options - NYSE Pillar Hardware Upgrade - Reminder
raw_text:
NYSE Arca Options - NYSE Pillar Hardware Upgrade - Reminder
Markets: NYSE ARCA OPTIONS; Services: Trading, Post Trade, Market Data
On Monday, June 1, 2026, NYSE Arca Options will upgrade hardware for its NYSE Pillar technology platform. There are no changes to specifications or sessions, and the migration will be an immediate cutover with no parallel production period, as previously announced . The Certification environment is currently available on the new hardware and the first industry test is scheduled for Saturday, May 16, 2026. Proprietary Market Data Feeds Concurrently with the hardware upgrade, NYSE Arca Options Top (BBO and Trades), Deep and Complex (excluding Imbalance and Summary) feeds will expand from 17 to 24 Publisher, Refresh and Retransmission channels. Please note that Certification Source IPs will change and the NYSE Proprietary Data IP Addresses file has been updated to reflect new Production channels and Certification source IPs. Customers should use the start of day symbol reference data for symbol mapping information. There will be no XDP format changes. Key Dates Industry Test #1 Saturday, May 16, 2026 Industry Test #2 Saturday, May 30, 2026 New hardware in Production Monday, June 1, 2026 Heartbeats on new market data channels Monday, June 1, 2026 Test symbols on new market data channels Tuesday, June 9, 2026 DR Industry Test Saturday, June 27, 2026 New hardware in DR Monday, June 29, 2026 Production symbols on new market data channels Tuesday, June 30, 2026

title: NYSE - New Security Notification for Symbol BWIV and BWIV WS
raw_text:
NYSE - New Security Notification for Symbol BWIV and BWIV WS
Markets: NYSE; Services: Trading
NYSE has determined that the Class A Ordinary Shares issued by Blue Water Acquisition Corp. IV is part of a new security offering that will trade under the ticker BWIV with CUSIP G1368A104 on May 11, 2026. As this new offering has not previously traded on any listing market and has no prior day's closing price, Regulation SHO Rule 201 will not apply to security BWIV until its second day of trading on NYSE. Further, NYSE Rule 123D(d) will apply and the security will be in a regulatory halt until the NYSE has opened trading. NYSE has determined that the Warrants entitling the holder to purchase one Class A ordinary share at a price of $11.50 per share issued by Blue Water Acquisition Corp. IV is part of a new security offering that will trade under the ticker BWIV WS with CUSIP G1368A112 on May 11, 2026. As this new offering has not previously traded on any listing market and has no prior day's closing price, Regulation SHO Rule 201 will not apply to security BWIV WS until its second day of trading on NYSE. Further, NYSE Rule 123D(d) will apply and the security will be in a regulatory halt until the NYSE has opened trading.

title: NYSE and NYSE Arca - Fee Changes Effective May 1, 2026
raw_text:
NYSE and NYSE Arca - Fee Changes Effective May 1, 2026
Markets: NYSE, NYSE ARCA EQUITIES; Services: Trading, Post Trade, Market Data
Effective May 1, 2026 , pending effectiveness of regulatory filings, NYSE and NYSE Arca will modify rates for securities with a per share price of $1.00 or above, as follows: NYSE Arca - New Retail Tier 6 NYSE Arca will introduce new Retail Tier 6 for orders that meet the following requirements: Retail Orders with a time-in-force of 'Day' that add and remove at least 0.075% of CADV; and Option Customer and Professional Customer Electronic Posting Volume of TCADV by OTP Holder or OTP Firm affiliated with the ETP Holder of at least 1.00%. ETP Holders that meet the above, will be eligible for the following rates: $0.0035 Credit for Retail Adding; and No fee for Retail Removing with a Time-in-force of Day up to a limit of 65 million shares, with a fee of $0.0025 for shares above that limit. NYSE - Removal Of Step-Up Tiers NYSE will eliminate Step-Up Tier 4 and Step-Up Tier 5 from its Price List. Step Up Tier 4: Credit of $0.0015 for adding in Tape A Securities for qualifying member organizations Step Up Tier 5 : Credits for qualifying member organization's market participant identifier ("MPID") as follows: $0.0001 incremental credit for adding in Tape A Securities for an increase of at least 0.10% or a $0.0002 incremental credit for an increase of at least 0.175% over the Baseline Month. $0.0029 credit for adding in Tape B and C Securities for an increase of at least 0.25% over the Baseline Month.

title: Welcome to the new IEX Trading Alert and System Status Application
raw_text:
Welcome to the new IEX Trading Alert and System Status Application
Category: Informational; Alert 2026-001
IEX’s new and improved Trading Alerts and System Status application is now live! This update is designed to improve reliability, delivery, and the overall experience. If you are receiving this via email: You have been subscribed to all IEX Equities Trading Alerts as well as all System Status Updates. To update your preferences or add a number to receive SMS text alerts, please go to https://notifications.iex.io and complete the steps below. (If you do not make updates, you will continue to be subscribed to Equities Trading Alerts, and all System Status Updates, and will receive them in the format you received this notification.) Click on the Log In button in the top right side of the screen Enter the email address you signed up to receive alerts to Look for an email with the subject line “Your Magic Link for IEX Trading Alerts” with a link to log in and update your preferences Click on the link or copy and paste the link directly into your browser to automatically log you in and allow you to update your preferences through the “My Preferences” tab, which will be available once logged in The “My Preferences" tab is where you can update the email address you receive alerts to as well as the phone number to receive SMS notifications If you did not receive this via email, you will need to subscribe manually to continue receiving alerts: To manually subscribe, please visit: https://notifications.iex.io Click “Subscribe” Enter the email address you would like to receive alerts to Look for an email with the subject line “Your Magic Link for IEX Trading Alerts” with a link to log in and update your preferences Click on that link or copy and paste the link directly into your browser to log you in and allow you to update your preferences The “My Preferences" tab is where you can update the email address you receive alerts to as well as the phone number to receive SMS notifications We recommend checking your spam or junk folder if you do not see the message in your inbox. Thank you for your continued support. More Information Please contact Market Operations or Sales with any questions: Market Operations: marketops@iextrading.com Sales: sales@iextrading.com About IEX Exchange Investors’ Exchange LLC (IEX Exchange) is a national securities exchange designed to provide superior execution quality and set a new standard for trading. Since launching in 2016, the exchange has grown to be one of the largest exchange operators globally, by notional value traded. To learn more about IEX Exchange visit iex.io .

title: New OPRA Symbol Distribution Confidence Test Final Reminder: Saturday, May 30, 2026, and Activation, Monday, June 1, 2026
raw_text:
New OPRA Symbol Distribution Confidence Test Final Reminder: Saturday, May 30, 2026, and Activation, Monday, June 1, 2026
1 May 18, 2026 To: OPRA Multicast Subscribers Subject: Final Testing Opportunity: New OPRA Symbol Distribution – Confidence Test Final Reminder: Saturday, May 30, 2026, and Activation, Monday, June 1, 2026 What’s New: For optimal symbol balancing and line capacity utilization, the symbol distribution for the Options Price Reporting Authority (OPRA) will be modified. Changes Being Made: The security symbol range over the OPRA will be redistributed. Reference the OPRA Traffic Distribution table below (page 2) for new symbol routing. The tables are available as CSV and Excel files. When it is Changing: OPRA will employ a new symbol distribution at the start of day Monday, June 1, 2026. Testing Dates: • Replay Testing: ➢ Began: Monday, May 4, 2026 ➢ Ends: Friday, May 29, 2026 ➢ Weeknights between 7:00-8:00pm ET (15-minute period; variable time dependent on the completion of afterhours) over multicast Playback Test channels (not Production channels) • Production Confidence Test: ➢ Saturday, May 30, 2026 (test plan on Page 3) • Activation Date: ➢ Monday, June 1, 2026 Data Subscribers who receive OPRA from connectivity service providers other than ICE Global Network (IGN) or the NMS Network must contact their connectivity service providers to coordinate testing. title: IEX Options LLC as a new OPRA Participant - UPDATE
raw_text:
IEX Options LLC as a new OPRA Participant - UPDATE
May 1, 2026 TO: OPRA Market Data Recipients FROM: OPRA, LLC SUBJECT: IEX Options LLC as a new OPRA Participant - UPDATE What’s New: IEX Options received SEC approval to trade listed options on September 18, 2025. What’s Changing: The new Exchange’s Participant ID is “V”. When is it Changing: • IEX Options plans to begin trading options on October 2, 2026. Please see test and launch schedule below. For further updates please sign up for future trader alerts at https://www.iex.io/options. Industry-wide Weekend Testing Schedule • Test data via OPRA SIP Certification and via test data files to be announced at later date. Test 1 Saturday, August 15 Test 2 Saturday, August 29 Final Confidence Test Saturday, September 19 Initial Launch Friday, October 2 Data Subscribers who receive OPRA from connectivity service providers other than ICE Global Network (IGN) or the NMS Network must contact their connectivity service providers to coordinate testing. Documentation The OPRA specifications have been revised to include IEX Options as a new Participant in OPRA. Please reference the latest specifications which may be obtained at the website: www.opraplan.com/document- library. Technical Inquiries • NMS Product Management Support Email: CTA-OPRA-Support@siac.com • NMS Product Management Support Line: 212-656-8177, Option 2 • NMS Product Management Phone Support Hours: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM ET

title: OPRA 96 Line New Symbol Distribution - Effective June 1, 2026 - May 9 Test Opportunity

OPRA 96 Line New Symbol Distribution - Effective June 1, 2026 - May 9 Test Opportunity
1 May 1, 2026 To: OPRA Multicast Subscribers Subject: Testing Opportunities: New OPRA Symbol Distribution – Functional and Capacity Testing: Saturday, May 9, 2026 - Revised New Distribution What’s New: For optimal symbol balancing and line capacity utilization, the symbol distribution for the Options Price Reporting Authority (OPRA) will be modified. Changes Being Made: The security symbol range over the OPRA will be redistributed. Reference the OPRA Traffic Distribution table below (page 2) for new symbol routing. The tables are available as CSV and Excel files. When it is Changing: OPRA will employ a new symbol distribution at the start of day Monday, June 1, 2026.
